tags.description: Seattle's first public fountain, a shallow basin covered with blue tile, with stone animal figures around the rim.
tags.name: Prefontaine Fountain

tags.source: USGS Seattle Orthophotos 2009 Calibrated to King County Coordinate Measurements

tags.fixme: There are conflicting definitions: A line West Point to Alki Point, or a line Duwamish Head to Magnolia Bluff. But in the latter case, which OSM seems to follow, the line is not drawn due north as it should be. It hits Expedia, which is not on the bluff.
tags.name: Elliott Bay
